steps.title: Spot the temporal range of the artifacts
steps.content: The notes mention two artifacts with specific dates: a cup from 1891 and a stickball collar from 2016. These dates, spanning more than a century, are the key data for making a generalization about the archive.

steps.title: Find the choice that generalizes from this range
steps.content: Choice D uses these two dates to make a broad claim about the archive's scope — it concludes the archive includes items from beyond the 1800s. Choices A, B, and C report individual facts from the notes rather than making a generalization about the archive. This matches choice D — D is correct.
